# ddff_environment (Data Source)

Looks up a Datadog feature flag environment by its stable key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ddff_environment" "production" {
  key = "production"
}

output "production_id" {
  value = data.ddff_environment.production.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Stable, code-facing key of the environment to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `id` (String) UUID of the environment.
- `is_production` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `queries` (List of String)
- `require_feature_flag_approval` (Boolean)
- `updated_at` (String)
